Lore Item No Trade
Slot: SHOULDERS
AC: 38
STR: +15 STA: +10 HP: +75
SV FIRE: +12 SV DISEASE: +12 SV COLD: +12 SV MAGIC: +12 SV POISON: +12
WT: 10.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: SHOULDERS
AC: 38
STR: +15 STA: +10 HP: +75
SV FIRE: +12 SV DISEASE: +12 SV COLD: +12 SV MAGIC: +12 SV POISON: +12
WT: 10.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Lore:Pauldrons of the Chosen
Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:hob
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-11 08:55:54
Page Updated:Sun Mar 13th, 2022

*This item is the result of a raid event.
Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 60
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Temple of Veeshan
NPC Name
Vulak`Aerr


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Temple of Veeshan

Post Comment
once uber..
QuoteReply
# Mar 17 2004 at 10:30 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592790879541
104 posts
...but not so good for the effort anymore

especially for a warrior with ornate.

Kizraks vambraces have only 4 less ac, 4(correct?) less stamina, and only 15 less hits.
Bazaar buyable, augment upgradable to 100hps with LDoN.

Not to mention the plate arms that can be purchased with AP from the North Ro camp which have VERY similar stats.
▲ Page top
RE: once uber..
QuoteReply
# Mar 18 2004 at 3:57 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591782121152
144 posts
These aren't arms though... They're shoulders.
▲ Page top

indeed you are correct.

55 posts
the AC and full resists very nicely balance out the 25 hard HP... nothin an aug from GoD or LDoN HP aug cant help balance out if ur still concerned.

Bah... I'd love to have it
QuoteReply
# May 08 2002 at 3:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761222747
147 posts
I'd be damn glad to get these for any of my characters, including the warrior, necro, pally, druid, rogue, or enchanter. All of them need the AC and the stats. Tanks do lose aggro on occasion.

Yeah winter, how about ya join the FV server and buy all the best suff, then when you have nothing to work twords or aspire to.....what then?
▲ Page top
RE: Bah... I'd love to have it
QuoteReply
# Jan 03 2003 at 1:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781675033
27 posts
I really wish EQ would not make so many items no-drop, I would love to see some of these items floating around(like I could afford it). Just a few, not all. It would really save SO many hours of keyboard bashing :-)
▲ Page top
RE: Bah... I'd love to have it
QuoteReply
# Mar 19 2003 at 2:56 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760325292
30 posts
There is already more than enough farming of items to sell in EQ. The reason the majority of the high end stuff is NO DROP is to give a reason for getting 65. If I could buy gear for a level 1 that was just as good as gear that a level 65 was wearing why would I spend that kind of time and effort to get to 65 and get the gear. In my opinion a much better idea would be to make much more stuff NO DROP & LORE to prevent people from buying their way to the top.

Just my thoughts..
[62 High Priest] Sameniel (High Elf) <Rendered Asylum>
[53 Mistrel] Samini (Wood Elf) <Orb of Silence>
[45 Warrior] Olauf (Troll) <Orb of Silence>
~~ Tholuxe Paells ~~

im low lvl give these 2 me and i will make sweet love 2 u irl
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 22 2001 at 4:04 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Anyone who actually gets to ToV in the first place is going to realise that AC and saves are #1, Int or whatever second. These Pauldrons are for *ALL* classes, not just melees. Anyh shaman who passes these up when given a chance to roll (although I doubt these would be rolled for...) is a moron, or needs to go back to level 30 or 40 when the tanks could taunt in time and the spells didn't do enough to kill you in one shot.
warrior shoulders
QuoteReply
# Sep 03 2001 at 8:00 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591749817370
Scholar
397 posts
These are warrior shoulders all the way, sorry guys. I'm a shaman but I wouldn't let myself take these from a warrior, thats just silly. all / all means I could, but not should. Oh well, a year from now; who knows?

__DEL__1591767063728

I agree. I'm a shaman, too, and these would be uber for me, but if I want melees to not covet stuff(fat chance) with mana and wisdom/int on them and try to hog all the good loot in the game, I can't play it the other way and feel bad if they get stuff that has NO mana/wis/int on it. I'd love these, but pass on them anyway even if they were awarded to me.

#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 29 2001 at 7:07 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) monks arent tanks, warriors are tanks, these are tank shoulders, monks are dmg dealer.

#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 24 2001 at 10:01 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Got a pair of these on Prexus. They aren't too bad. I've seen better though. I just keep 'em in the bank. Too bad they are no drop - was gonna trade em for some Gnome sammiches.......
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 24 2001 at 12:13 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Definately a monk item =)
#Anonymous, Posted: Aug 24 2001 at 1:13 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Nope certainly didn't have to be said....
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 26 2001 at 7:28 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) No. I'm gonna have to say that it was just never funny. Yeah. Not at all.
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 23 2001 at 6:00 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) odds are 90% of the people playing everquest right now will never see ToV much less get to Vulak, dont expect to ever get a pair of these.
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 23 2001 at 10:23 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Why are you guys so negative about this extremely rare gear?? Of course no one really expects to get this stuff, but its still awesome that some people do.
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 24 2001 at 9:10 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) why are you such an idiot? Who cares how negative they are? its not yer buisness why he is so negative.
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 24 2001 at 1:56 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Right back at ya, Poxxed.
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 23 2001 at 5:38 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) man if this wasnt so heavy i would love one for my monkey
#Anonymous, Posted: Aug 28 2001 at 10:17 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Even with ten weight, I'm sure most monks would still love to use this. Look.
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 26 2001 at 4:17 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) again, who cares.
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 24 2001 at 9:52 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) We honestly care....(NOT)
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 23 2001 at 5:37 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Egad those are some nice shoulder pads! I would kill (the mob, of course) for those!!!
